description: Address semantic review findings: test ID race condition, missing-key crash guard, ephemeral active_test_id persistence, double preprocessing, detect_student_number recomputation, and auto-rotation order
steps: Fix _generate_test_id() to atomically claim the file using os.O_CREAT | os.O_EXCL with retry
Add missing-key guard at top of _process_scan_image after loading test_data
Add _get_active_test_id and _set_active_test_id helpers for disk persistence of active test
Remove _preprocess_image call inside _detect_corner_markers (already preprocessed by caller)
Add binary_adaptive and binary_otsu optional params to detect_student_number
Pass pre-computed binary images from scan_answer_sheet to detect_student_number
acceptance_criteria: detect_student_number signature includes binary_adaptive and binary_otsu params
_generate_test_id uses os.O_CREAT | os.O_EXCL for atomic file creation
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/ufqbot/test_grader_bot && python -c 'import bot; import omr_scanner; print("OK")'

cd /projects/sandbox/ufqbot/test_grader_bot && python -c 'from omr_scanner import scan_answer_sheet, detect_student_number; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature(detect_student_number); print(sig); assert "binary_adaptive" in str(sig)'
cd /projects/sandbox/ufqbot/test_grader_bot && python -c 'import bot; assert hasattr(bot, "_get_active_test_id"); assert hasattr(bot, "_set_active_test_id"); print("Persistence helpers exist")'
